title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 3, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, push, create, list, copy, delete, show, ps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Chat, LLM, embeddings and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style). Runs entirely in browser or via Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Chat, generate, pull, list, delete, show, copy, embed.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple interface to chat, generate, pull, list, delete, copy, show.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL wrapper around the Ollama REST API with history, syntax highlighting, themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code completer for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team. Use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chat, voice bots, function calling, RAG, fine-tuning, edge deployment.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama. Small, zero-dependency module for chat, generate, pull, list, embed.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama. Chat, generate, stream, pull, list, copy, delete, embed.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate for Ollama. Async client covering chat, generate, pull, list, copy, delete, embed.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot wrapper for Ollama. Group & private chats, streaming, custom system prompts.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that brings Ollama models into channels with @ mentions and threads.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Convert & quantize Hugging Face models to GGUF then push straight into Ollama model library.
